status.missing: control present but dead, or feature absent

tasks.task: Wire Void / Cancel / Mark Complete in the order drawer to mutate session status and move the card between columns.
tasks.verify: Open a session, click Mark Complete: card moves to the Completed column and the drawer reflects the new status.

tasks.task: Implement Print Receipt on completed orders (trigger print job + toast).
tasks.verify: On a completed order, click Print Receipt: a success toast appears.

tasks.task: Implement Retry on failed print jobs (re-queue + status update).
tasks.verify: On a failed print job, click Retry: the job status changes from Failed to queued/printed.

tasks.task: Build the toolbar Filter panel (status, table, time range).
tasks.verify: Click Filter: a panel opens; applying a filter narrows the board.

tasks.task: Make Refresh reload order data, not just play the chime.
tasks.verify: Click Refresh: order data visibly re-reads (timestamps/order set update).

areas.note: Live floor view used during service.

tasks.task: Make the Krypton Main / Krypton Bar terminal selector switch the table set.
tasks.verify: Switch terminal: the table grid changes to that terminal's tables.

tasks.task: Wire Void Session and Mark Paid in the table drawer.
tasks.verify: Open a table, click Mark Paid: the table returns to Available and the drawer closes.

tasks.task: Implement New Order and Sync POS.
tasks.verify: Click New Order: an order-entry flow opens. Click Sync POS: a sync toast appears.

tasks.task: Build Create / Edit / Delete Role with a permission-assignment UI.
tasks.verify: Create a role, assign permissions, save: it appears in the roles table with the right counts.

tasks.task: Wire the role Permissions action to manage granted abilities.
tasks.verify: Click Permissions on a role: a UI opens to toggle that role's abilities and saves.

tasks.task: Build Add / Edit / Delete Permission on the Permissions registry.
tasks.verify: Add a permission: it appears in the registry list.

tasks.task: Implement Invite User (form + create).
tasks.verify: Click Invite User, fill the form, submit: the new member appears in the roster.

tasks.task: Wire Save Changes so permission toggles persist; implement Remove.
tasks.verify: Toggle a permission, Save, reselect the user: the toggle holds. Remove deletes the row.

tasks.task: Make the roster Search box filter the list.
tasks.verify: Type a name: the roster narrows to matches.

tasks.task: Build New Package / Edit / Preview for tiers.
tasks.verify: Create/edit a tier: changes reflect on the tier cards.

tasks.task: Build New Config and row editing on the Configs tab.
tasks.verify: Add a config: it appears in the Configs table.

tasks.task: Implement drag-to-reorder with persistence — the advertised core feature.
tasks.verify: Drag a category by its grip handle to a new position: the order changes and survives reselect.

tasks.task: Wire New Category / Edit and Attach / Detach Menu.
tasks.verify: Attach a menu to a category: it appears in that category's attached-menus list.

tasks.task: Implement Add Device, Sync All and APK Download.
tasks.verify: Click Add Device: a device-add flow opens. Sync All shows a sync toast.

tasks.task: Wire per-device View (detail) and Restart.
tasks.verify: Click View on a card: device detail opens. Restart shows a restart toast/state.

tasks.task: Wire Refresh, View Jobs, Purge Failed and Print Audit.
tasks.verify: Each button performs its action or opens its panel.

tasks.task: Make the Purge All confirm actually clear print events.
tasks.verify: Confirm Purge All: print-event counters reset to zero.

tasks.task: Add CSV / PDF export.
tasks.verify: Click Export: a file downloads with the current report data.

tasks.task: Add a custom date-range picker beyond week/month presets.
tasks.verify: Pick a custom range: the chart and totals update for that range.

tasks.task: Persist all settings fields (not just theme & sound).
tasks.verify: Change items-per-page and integration URLs, Save, reload: values hold.

tasks.task: Implement Reset to Defaults.
tasks.verify: Click Reset to Defaults: all fields return to default values.

tasks.task: Wire Delete inside the item editor.
tasks.verify: Open an item, click Delete: the card is removed from the grid.

tasks.task: Replace the image filename field with a real upload / picker.
tasks.verify: Pick/drop an image in the editor: a preview shows and saves with the item.

tasks.task: Persist added / edited items (currently session-only).
tasks.verify: Add an item, reload: it is still present.

tasks.task: Make the Today / Week / Month revenue toggle change the chart.
tasks.verify: Switch to Week: the revenue chart and total update.

tasks.task: Wire 'View all' on Recent Sessions.
tasks.verify: Click View all: navigates to the full sessions list.

tasks.task: Wire global search + ⌘K shortcut.
tasks.verify: Press ⌘K: search focuses; typing returns matching results.

tasks.task: Implement the topbar refresh and notification bell.
tasks.verify: Refresh reloads the active screen's data; the bell opens a notifications dropdown.

tasks.task: Add a real branch switcher (and enable the Branches page).
tasks.verify: Switch branch: data context changes; the Branches page opens instead of being disabled.

tasks.task: Render a sidebar collapse toggle.
tasks.verify: Click the collapse control: the rail collapses to icons and re-expands.
